pages.text: $(l)Identity$()$(br2)The Cave Dweller is a cave predator made to turn underground exploration into a stalking experience.$(br2)$(l)Impression$()$(br2)The deeper you go, the less the cave feels empty. Even normal cave sounds start to feel like warnings.

pages.title: Behavior
pages.text: $(l)Presence$()$(br2)It builds fear by stalking the player before fully committing to an attack.$(br2)$(l)Fear Style$()$(br2)Its strength is making caves feel occupied, hostile, and unsafe.
